description: Threat model matrix for V1 security boundaries with complete deterministic fuzz seed coverage and replayable adversarial evidence.

threat_categories.name: Cache Key Confusion
threat_categories.description: Hostile cache metadata, unknown features, and key material drift cannot alias unrelated compiled state.
controls: strict mode rejects unknown incompatible features
hardened mode includes unknown features in deterministic key material
cache lifecycle gate covers stale/corrupt bypass paths

threat_categories.name: Transform Ordering and Proof Hygiene
threat_categories.description: Wrong transform order, duplicate evidence, or stale proof bindings fail closed before execution claims semantic equivalence.
controls: evidence ids bind to transforms
stack signatures include evidence content
TTL semantic gate rejects stale, duplicate, and wrong-transform proofs

threat_categories.name: Malformed IR/Jaxpr Graphs
threat_categories.description: Malformed graphs with missing vars, duplicate bindings, unreachable outputs, or binary noise cannot panic validators.
controls: typed validation errors for unknown outvars
fuzz corpus includes malformed JSON and duplicate var examples

threat_categories.name: Shape and DType Signatures
threat_categories.description: Hostile shape/dtype signatures, impossible element counts, and invalid primitive input classes produce typed outcomes.
controls: shape inference corpus covers high-rank and malformed signatures
value deserializer corpus covers count overflow and dtype mismatch
error taxonomy binds primitive dtype and shape rows

threat_categories.name: Sub-Jaxprs and Control Flow
threat_categories.description: Malformed control-flow subgraphs and unsupported transform tails fail closed with exact classes.
controls: control-flow matrix gates supported and fail-closed rows
shape inference corpus includes cond, scan, while, and switch seeds

threat_categories.name: Serialized Fixtures and Logs
threat_categories.description: Malformed fixture bundles, parity logs, and E2E forensic logs are rejected or classified before dashboard ingestion.
controls: fixture bundle corpus includes truncated and unknown-value inputs
smoke harness corpus includes malformed and inconsistent reports
E2E validator rejects malformed or stale log metadata

threat_categories.name: FFI Boundaries
threat_categories.description: C ABI calls, buffers, callbacks, and error propagation keep invalid inputs on typed error paths.
controls: FFI adversarial E2E covers clean errors
FFI buffer lifecycle E2E covers allocation and release

threat_categories.name: Durability Sidecars
threat_categories.description: Corrupt sidecars, missing artifacts, and decode failures are represented as typed durability outcomes.
controls: durability coverage policy inventories required triplets
RaptorQ decoder corpus covers corrupt and undersized payloads

threat_categories.name: Evidence Ledger Recovery
threat_categories.description: Recovery and audit decisions preserve action, alternatives, evidence, and replayable log artifacts.
controls: ledger E2E audit trail records selected actions and evidence
strict/hardened divergence rows are allowlisted and replayable
